title: White (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:NevIceFlow-TCSBRBD2.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth's]] snow-white surface]]
'''White''' can refer to the [[Color/Legends|color]] [[Wikipedia:White|white]], or any of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[White (droid)|'''White''']], a [[replica droid]].
*'''[[White Worms]]''', a criminal organization on [[Corellia]].
*[[Knobby white spider]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Jannik (Rodian)|'''Jannik the White''']], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]].
*[[White (soldier)|'''White''']], a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]].
*[[Adepts of the White Current]]
*The White Knights of the Republic, a term for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[File:Cloneboys.jpg|thumb|right|210px|The White Knights of the Republic]]
*[[Ylesian white worm]]
*[[White Ledge]], a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]]
*[[White Way]], a street in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
*''[[White Witch]]'', a vehicle.
*[[White-blight]], a disease
*[[White Current/Legends|White Current]], an alternate name for [[The Force/Legends|The Force]]
*[[White dwarf/Legends|White dwarf]]
*[[Star Destroyer White]], a paint color
*[[White Wings of Hope]], a sacred hat

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*[[Black Knight, White Princess, and Pawns]]
*"[[The White Witch]]"
*''[[The White Witch: A Droid Adventure]]''
*''[[White Wolf Magazine 15]]''
